description_long: This house features a compact, rectangular structure with a prominent orange gable roof and white exterior walls accented by dark trim. The front facade includes a small covered porch with steps leading up to the main entryway, and a single-car garage attached to one side. Windows are symmetrically arranged, with larger panes on the ground floor and smaller ones above, providing balanced natural light. The roof has a moderate pitch and extends slightly over the edges, offering some protection from the elements. The house sits on a green lawn, suggesting a suburban or residential neighborhood setting. Architectural details are simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on practicality.
description: A compact, white house with an orange gable roof, attached garage, and a small covered porch, set on a green lawn. Symmetrical windows and simple, functional design evoke a suburban residential style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a small porch, steps, and the attached garage to the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the sloped gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, smaller windows, and the roof's overhang.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional windows and the continuation of the gable roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small covered porch, steps, and a simple door; attached garage to the side.
